title: Register WalletConnect project for mobile wallet connections
description:
**Parent Issue**: [GOO-403](/GOO/issues/GOO-403) - WalletConnect projectId placeholder breaks mobile wallets

**Required Actions**:
1. Go to https://cloud.walletconnect.com  
2. Register a new project for "GoodDollar L2"
3. Copy the generated projectId 
4. Set `NEXT_PUBLIC_WC_PROJECT_ID=<projectId>` in production deployment environment (Vercel env vars)
5. Verify mobile wallet QR connections work post-deployment

**Context**: Critical for L2 launch readiness (per Chief Architect). Frontend code ready, only needs the env var set.

**Verification**: E2E test `infra/walletconnect_project_id` will auto-pass once projectId is properly set.
